title: [codereview-pass1-3] P4: Rustdoc formatting and cross-crate consistency for CCP-16
description: Third review pass: docs use **bold** which is fine but ensure all public items have examples or # Panics/Errors if applicable (none here). Check that lichen-rpl reexports or links match mesh-gateway usage. No bugs found. All P4s addressed in prior fixes. codereview.
